title: Cherry — Seen First
content_html:
you saw them first

then pretended you didn't

not because you're rude

because saying hi first felt too loud

so you waited for the moment to pass

and called it nothing

but your brain still counted it

try one tiny social rep instead

That tiny moment still counts. Cherry helps you practice small social reps and log what actually happened. Google Play link in bio. https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=site.cherryapp.cherry&hl=en_US

#socialanxiety #overthinking #anxietytools #confidencebuilding #mentalhealthapp

title: Cherry — Message Opened
content_html:
you opened the message

closed it

opened it again

typed three words

deleted them

then decided tomorrow-you would know what to say

tomorrow-you usually doesn't

make the reply smaller

The reply does not have to be perfect. It just has to be small enough to send. Cherry is on Google Play. https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=site.cherryapp.cherry&hl=en_US

#socialanxiety #overthinking #anxietytools #confidencebuilding #mentalhealthapp

title: Cherry — Twelve Minutes
content_html:
cancelling felt good

for about twelve minutes

then the room got quiet again

and the thing you avoided got bigger

not morally

just neurologically

your brain learned the exit

teach it one small entrance

Avoidance is relief with interest. Cherry helps you build tiny reps without needing confidence first. https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=site.cherryapp.cherry&hl=en_US

#socialanxiety #overthinking #anxietytools #confidencebuilding #mentalhealthapp

title: Cherry — Receipt Printer Rep #014
content_html:
You pretend not to see someone so you do not have to say hi first.

Avoidance feels like relief, but it also teaches the habit to come back stronger.

That is why 'collecting real evidence' needs a tiny repeatable system, not just another good intention.

The win is not perfection. The win is a repeatable rep.

One note afterward: what did I expect, and what actually happened?

Then log what happened so the next rep gets easier to choose.

Cherry helps with tiny social reps, prediction vs reality logs — without turning it into another vague intention.

Which part is hardest: starting, continuing, or coming back after you miss?

You pretend not to see someone so you do not have to say hi first. The fix is not a giant breakthrough. Start with one tiny rep, then make the next one easier to repeat.
